notes: Trend groups assigned by keyword matching on English titles, then manually reviewed for manager value labels.

trends.name: Solo Leveling Season 2 / Jinwoo Arc
trends.manager_note: Multiple recap channels following latest SL content; strong cross-channel resonance expected.

trends.name: Jujutsu Kaisen Current Arc
trends.manager_note: Evergreen high-volume topic; breakout depends on episode timing.

trends.name: One Piece Egghead / Recent Arc
trends.manager_note: Large channels post routinely; algorithm should not over-rank single large-channel uploads.

trends.name: Demon Slayer Hashira / Infinity Castle
trends.manager_note: Major franchise; resonance plus relative breakout distinguishes real trends.

trends.name: Bleach / Soul Reaper Arc
trends.manager_note: Soul Reaper content spike across recap channels.

trends.name: Isekai Reincarnation Power Fantasy
trends.manager_note: Common recap trope; moderate value unless multi-channel spike.

trends.name: Chainsaw Man Season 2 / Reze Arc
trends.manager_note: High interest when multiple channels cover same arc within 72h.

trends.name: Dandadan Supernatural Battles
trends.manager_note: Rising title with strong shorts potential.

trends.name: Frieren Emotional Arc Moments
trends.manager_note: Steady performer but lower urgency unless multi-channel spike.

trends.name: Kaiju No. 8 Action Highlights
trends.manager_note: Good for action shorts when breakout ratio is high.

trends.name: Blue Lock Sports Highlights
trends.manager_note: Niche sports anime audience; moderate priority.

trends.name: My Hero Academia Final Saga
trends.manager_note: Legacy franchise; watch for coordinated arc recaps.

trends.name: Generic Multi-Arc Compilation
trends.manager_note: Counter-example: listicles and generic compilations should rank lower.

trends.name: Manhwa/Webtoon Recap Crossover
trends.manager_note: Counter-example: adjacent niche, lower manager priority for anime team.

trends.name: Unclustered / Other
trends.manager_note: Default bucket for videos not matching known trend keywords.
